item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: “My son died. So I went to war.” A Ukrainian defender explains why he chose to fight.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.description: No one can touch the ultra wealthy. They do what they want. They play with us like toys. Like petulant children, they get mad at us when we break and discard us for something new. They'll use up earth then leave someday, too. Maybe not in my lifetime, but the next few generations for sure.. I think we're doomed but not in a doomer way, in a ~i was born in their toybox and have never left the playpen~ kinda way. In the way that there will be no substantial change until capitalism falls. There will be another trump, epstein, diddy, more fraud and scams until we break out of the system warping everything in favor of the sick fucks reaping what WE sow. We are forced to assimilate or struggle & die, we are forced to participate in the pollution causing mass production and consumerism, we're forced to buy their oil and invest in their stock for our retirements. We've done it all at their behest. This concludes me shouting into the void.
item.dc:creator: LazerSpacePirate

item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: WhistlinDiesel Test Cybertruck Durability
item.description: WhistlinDiesel is a popular YouTube series starring Cody Detwiler. https://youtube.com/@whistlindiesel?si=8jL8KaixM4w5z-yl The Tesla Cybertruck is not legal to drive on public roads in the UK, in many other places. Among other things it's a matter of safety standards, including issues with sharp, angular, stainless-steel edges (failing to meet pedestrian protection rules).
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

20
21
22
23
24
25
27 Man Tax: Paul Brannigan
"There is no duty we so much underrate as the duty of being happy. By being happy we sow anonymous benefits upon the world." - Robert Louis Stevenson So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
oh i guess this got into my imgur folder. huh. okies.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things they wont use like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: I'll never understand JKR
item.description: Bluesky Meme Post: https://bsky.app/profile/gwenisbackonherbs.bsky.social/post/3mkqu3ukqbk2z Bluesky #transmemes feed: https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:6fvvaoxvxgea7ngj6vrpwnts/feed/aaak2d3vtc7pm If you don't want to see this, block #transmemes. If you choose to see this and downvote it even though you aren't the target audience it kind of makes you a jerk. You have every opportunity to not see the things you don't want to see without ruining it for others. Don't be a dick If you do want to see more of this nonsense follow #transmemes on imgur.
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: Put your memes in me
item.description:
It also wants beer
They also did a comic about how log scale graphs are for cowards
I would argue that you can't walk to a country you're already in.
The Rise of Skywalker was most definitely an error.
The Finns understand me.
Apparently the upcoming Minecraft update does some crazy things with a new kind of slime.
I wonder how he did it.
I hope Bennie earned an advanced degree for this thesis because it's spot on.
I used to be with it, but then they changed what it was!
Unfair
The Minecraft house doesn't accumulate dust everywhere for no reason. Also eating inside it doesn't leave crumbs.
Flesh and Blood TCG tax. Necromancy was a mistake.
